welcome.title: Welcome to Aman Digital Care
welcome.text: Your personal, confidential companion for addiction recovery and mental wellness.

programs.title: Structured Recovery Programs
programs.text: Choose from 90-day, evidence-based programs designed to guide you step-by-step on your journey.

ai.title: 24/7 AI Companion
ai.text: Chat with Aman, your AI partner, anytime you need support, guidance, or just someone to listen.

tracking.title: Track Your Progress
tracking.text: Log your mood, journal your thoughts, and see your growth over time with our analytics tools.

cta.title: Your Path Starts Here
cta.text: Ready to take the first step? Explore our programs and start your journey today.

hero.title: Your Safe Space for Healing & Growth
hero.subtitle: Aman Digital Care is a free, confidential AI companion designed to support you on your journey through addiction and mental health challenges. You are not alone.

mission.title: Why We're Here
mission.subtitle: Rooted in a legacy of compassion, dedicated to accessible support for all.
mission.p1: Our mission is simple: to provide a safe, non-judgmental space for healing. Born from over two decades of real-world addiction and mental health support, Aman Digital Care is a non-profit initiative dedicated to making recovery accessible to everyone, anytime.
mission.p2: We believe in empowering you with the tools you need, right on your own device, with complete privacy.

how_it_works.title: Your Path to Wellness
how_it_works.subtitle: A clear, supportive journey designed around you.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Start with an evidence-informed, 90-day program tailored to your needs, like Mindfulness or CBT.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Receive daily challenges, log your moods, and journal your thoughts to build healthy habits.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Chat with Aman, your AI companion, for support, to practice conversations, or to use a wellness tool when you need it most.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Visualize your progress through personal analytics, celebrate milestones, and watch your 'Growth Garden' flourish.

safe_space.title: A Safe & Confidential Space
safe_space.subtitle: Your privacy and peace of mind are our highest priorities.
safe_space.item1_desc: You don't need to use your real name. Your journey is your own.
safe_space.item2_desc: Your journal entries and personal data are stored locally on your device, not on our servers.
safe_space.item3_desc: Aman AI is trained to be an empathetic, supportive listener, available 24/7 without judgment.

final_cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
final_cta.subtitle: Take the first step towards a healthier, more balanced life. Your path to recovery is waiting.

programs.title: Your Path to Recovery
programs.subtitle: Choose from one of our evidence-based, 90-day programs. Each is designed to provide you with the tools, knowledge, and support you need for lasting change. You can switch programs at any time.

about.title: About Aman Digital Care
about.subtitle: A non-profit initiative dedicated to providing accessible and confidential mental health and addiction support.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: To leverage technology to provide free, confidential, and immediate support for individuals struggling with addiction and mental health challenges. We believe everyone deserves a chance to heal, regardless of their circumstances.
mission.p2: Aman Digital Care is built on the principles of empathy, accessibility, and evidence-based care, making recovery support available to anyone, anytime.

legacy.title: Rooted in a Legacy of Care
legacy.p1: Aman Digital Care is more than just an application; it's the digital evolution of a mission that began in 2001. Our founder's family has operated a de-addiction, rehabilitation, and mental health NGO for over two decades, providing offline support to more than 200,000 individuals on their path to recovery.
legacy.p2: Our journey began in Delhi, India, working with incarcerated individuals struggling with addiction in Tihar Jail. This deep, real-world experience, born from a commitment to help those in the most challenging circumstances, is the bedrock of our approach. From those humble beginnings, the Aman Foundation is now transforming into the world's best mental health companion, bringing decades of compassionate, effective care into the digital space to support you.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Providing free and immediate support to anyone in need, breaking down barriers to care.

empathy.title: Empathy
empathy.description: Creating a non-judgmental, compassionate space where users feel safe and understood.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: Upholding the highest standards of user privacy and data security, ensuring a trustworthy experience.

foundation.title: The AMAN AI Foundation
foundation.description: Aman Digital Care is a flagship project of the AMAN AI Foundation, a non-profit organization focused on using artificial intelligence for social good. Our work is supported by volunteers and donors who share our vision of a healthier world.

cta.title: Join the Journey
cta.description: Ready to take the first step? Explore our programs and begin your path to a healthier life today.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question, feedback, or a partnership inquiry, please reach out.

success.title: Message Sent!
success.message: Thank you for reaching out. We've received your message and will get back to you shortly.

chatbot.title: Aman AI
chatbot.subtitle: Your 24/7 Companion
chatbot.initial_message: Hello! I'm Aman, your personal recovery companion. I'm here to listen, support, and guide you. How are you feeling today?
chatbot.crisis_confirm: This will trigger a crisis alert. Are you sure you need immediate help?
chatbot.error_message: I'm sorry, I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please check your internet connection and try again.
chatbot.suggested_prompt_2: Can we do a mindfulness exercise?

toolkit.title: AI Wellness Toolkit
toolkit.subtitle: A collection of AI-powered tools to help you manage cravings, reframe thoughts, and find calm in the moment.

breathing.title: 4-7-8 Breathing Exercise
breathing.description: Use this simple breathing technique to calm your nervous system and reduce anxiety.

meditation.title: AI Guided Meditation
meditation.description: Tell Aman how you're feeling, and it will generate a short, personalized meditation script just for you.

cbt.title: AI Cognitive Reframing (CBT)
cbt.description: Identify and challenge a negative thought. Aman will guide you through a CBT exercise to find a more balanced perspective.
cbt.placeholder: e.g., 'I feel like I'm going to fail'

gratitude.title: AI Gratitude Prompt
gratitude.description: Click the button and Aman will generate a unique, insightful prompt to help you cultivate gratitude.

toolkit.error: I'm sorry, I was unable to generate the exercise. Please try again.

echoes_of_strength.title: Echoes of Strength
echoes_of_strength.description: Transform your personal motivations into powerful audio affirmations. Hear your 'why' spoken back to you in a calm, supportive voice.
echoes_of_strength.placeholder: e.g., 'I am strong enough to do this for my children.'
echoes_of_strength.empty_history: Your generated affirmations will appear here.
echoes_of_strength.error: Sorry, I couldn't generate the audio. Please try again.

future_self_visualization.title: Future Self Visualization
future_self_visualization.description: Describe a future goal or feeling. Aman will generate a personalized guided imagery audio session to help you vividly experience and manifest it.
future_self_visualization.placeholder: e.g., 'Feeling confident and calm at a family gathering.'
future_self_visualization.error: Sorry, I couldn't create the visualization. Please try again.

nutrition_navigator.title: Nutrition Navigator
nutrition_navigator.description: Get AI-powered meal ideas and nutritional tips tailored to your recovery goals and preferences.
nutrition_navigator.placeholder: e.g., 'healthy snack ideas', 'budget-friendly meals to boost energy'

community.title: Community Wall
community.subtitle: Share your thoughts, successes, and struggles with the community. All posts are anonymous.
community.said_hi: ...just wanted to say hi to everyone!
community.empty: The wall is quiet right now. Be the first to share something!
community.mic_error: Microphone access is required to record a voice note. Please grant permission in your browser settings.
community.report_confirm_text: This post will be hidden from your view. Our team will review it for community guideline violations. Are you sure?

group_session.title: AI Group Sessions
group_session.subtitle: Join an AI-moderated group session on a topic that matters to you. All interactions are anonymous.
group_session.disclaimer: This is an AI-simulated group session for practice and support. The 'peers' are AI-generated.

gratitude.title: Gratitude Circle
gratitude.description: Share something you're thankful for, big or small.
gratitude.initial_message: Welcome to the Gratitude Circle. Let's take a moment to focus on the positive. What is one thing, no matter how small, that you're grateful for today?

celebrating_wins.title: Celebrating Small Wins
celebrating_wins.description: Acknowledge a recent success or step forward in your journey.
celebrating_wins.initial_message: Welcome, everyone. This space is for celebrating our progress. What's a small win you've had recently that you'd like to share?

navigating_cravings.title: Navigating a Craving
navigating_cravings.description: Share strategies and get support for managing cravings.
navigating_cravings.initial_message: Welcome. If you're dealing with cravings, you're not alone. What has helped you get through a tough moment, or what challenges are you facing right now?

managing_stress.title: Managing Stress
managing_stress.description: Discuss healthy ways to cope with stress and anxiety.
managing_stress.initial_message: Hello, and welcome. Stress is a major part of life and recovery. Let's talk about it. How has stress been affecting you, and what are some healthy ways you've found to cope?

live_talk.title: Live Talk with Aman
live_talk.subtitle: Have a real-time voice conversation with your AI companion. It's a safe space to talk things through.
live_talk.no_program_error: You need to be enrolled in a program to use Live Talk. Please select a program first.
live_talk.mic_permission: Microphone permission is required. Please enable it in your browser settings to continue.

status.idle: Ready to start when you are.

live_talk.ethical_boundary: Hello, I'm Aman. I want you to know I am an AI and not a licensed therapist, and this conversation is for support, not medical advice.
live_talk.initial_greeting: It's good to hear your voice, {userName}. I see you're on day {day} of the {programName} program. How are things for you today?

sober_circle_page.title: Sober Circle
sober_circle_page.subtitle: Discover sober-friendly places and activities near you. Find your new favorite spot for connection and fun.
sober_circle_page.placeholder: e.g., 'coffee shops with good vibes', 'quiet parks', 'late night cafes'
sober_circle_page.location_denied: Location access was denied. This feature requires your location to find nearby places.
sober_circle_page.error: Sorry, I couldn't find any places at this time. Please try a different search.
sober_circle_page.no_results: No results found for that search. Try being more general, like 'calm places' or 'bookstores'.

prevention_plan_page.title: Relapse Prevention Plan
prevention_plan_page.subtitle: Work with Aman AI in a live conversation to build a proactive plan for handling triggers and staying on track.
prevention_plan_page.no_program_error: You need to be enrolled in a program to create a Prevention Plan.
prevention_plan_page.select_program_link: Select a program to get started.
prevention_plan_page.initial_greeting: Welcome. I'm here to help you build a strong relapse prevention plan. This is a powerful step in your recovery. We'll do this together, one step at a time.

conversation_practice.title: AI Conversation Practice
conversation_practice.subtitle: Build confidence by practicing difficult conversations in a safe, judgment-free space with a responsive AI partner.

refusing_drink.title: Refusing a Drink at a Party
refusing_drink.description: Practice saying "no" confidently when offered a drink in a social setting.

explaining_recovery.title: Explaining Your Recovery
explaining_recovery.description: Practice talking about your recovery journey to someone who is curious.

setting_boundary.title: Setting a Boundary
setting_boundary.description: Practice setting a healthy boundary with a friend or family member.

opening_up_anxiety.title: Opening Up About Anxiety
opening_up_anxiety.description: Practice talking about what anxiety feels like to a concerned friend or partner.

handling_unsolicited_advice.title: Handling Unsolicited Advice
handling_unsolicited_advice.description: Practice responding to well-meaning but unhelpful advice about your mental health.

turning_down_hard_drugs.title: Turning Down Hard Drugs
turning_down_hard_drugs.description: Practice a high-stakes refusal with an acquaintance from your past.

declining_cannabis.title: Declining Cannabis Socially
declining_cannabis.description: Practice refusing cannabis in a casual social setting where others are partaking.

talking_to_doctor.title: Talking to a Doctor
talking_to_doctor.description: Practice clearly describing your mental health symptoms to a healthcare professional.

gemini.daily_focus_fallback: Remember to be kind to yourself today. Every step forward, no matter how small, is progress.

mood_chart.no_data: Log your mood on the dashboard to see your trend here.

certificate.title: Certificate of Appreciation
certificate.recognition_text: In grateful recognition of your generous donation of {amount} via {method}. Your support helps keep Aman Digital Care free and accessible to all.

approach_page.title: Our Evidence-Informed Approach
approach_page.subtitle: Grounded in clinical science, powered by compassionate AI.
approach_page.section1_p1: Aman Digital Care is an evidence-informed tool built on established therapeutic principles. Our programs and the AI's guidance draw from gold-standard methods used in addiction and mental health treatment:
approach_page.section1_item1_text: The 'gold standard' in therapy. We help you identify, challenge, and reframe the negative thought patterns that drive addictive behaviors.
approach_page.section1_item2_text: Rooted in practices like MBSR (Mindfulness-Based Stress Reduction), we guide you to stay present, manage stress, and navigate cravings without judgment.
approach_page.section1_item3_text: A collaborative style used by therapists to help you find and strengthen your own internal motivation for lasting change.
approach_page.section2_p1: Your companion, Aman AI, is powered by Google's advanced models, specifically trained by us for this supportive role. It is designed to be a safe, non-judgmental listener that can apply the principles above in conversation, help you practice new skills, and offer encouragement 24/7.
approach_page.disclaimer_text: Aman Digital Care is a supportive tool, not a medical device or a healthcare provider. Our service does not provide diagnosis or treatment and is not a substitute for care from a qualified professional. Please consult a licensed healthcare provider for any medical advice.
approach_page.section3_p1: Your safety is our highest priority. Our AI is trained to recognize crisis language and guide you toward immediate help. The SOS button is always available in the app to connect you with professional crisis resources from around the world.
approach_page.section4_p1: We believe in empowering you with the tools for self-guided recovery. Aman Digital Care is a comprehensive toolkit designed to be your primary companion, providing the support, structure, and strategies you need to navigate your journey independently.

policies_page.title: Policies & Legal
policies_page.subtitle: Our commitment to transparency, privacy, and safety.
